codeReview.summary: The earlier preview-gating and UI-test-proof issues called out against commit d22792a are addressed in the current head revision. I did not find any additional high-confidence actionable bugs in the reviewed scope.

summary: Pass. I reviewed the current alarm editor validation implementation, its tests, the prior review artifact, and the worker handoff/transcript context. In HEAD, preview generation is blocked for invalid editor states, the committed UI tests now stay within real navigation paths, and I found no new high-confidence actionable issues for this feature.
